channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: garrytan /gstack | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: github /spec-kit | Python | N/A
item.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: CloakHQ /CloakBrowser | Python | N/A
item.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

item.title: NVIDIA-AI-Blueprints /video-search-and-summarization | Python | N/A
item.description: Suite of reference architectures for building GPU-accelerated vision agents and AI-powered video analytics applications.

item.title: Genymobile /scrcpy | C | N/A
item.description: Display and control your Android device

item.title: supertone-inc /supertonic | Swift | N/A
item.description: Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.

item.title: influxdata /telegraf | Go | N/A
item.description: Agent for collecting, processing, aggregating, and writing metrics, logs, and other arbitrary data.

item.title: roboflow /supervision | Python | N/A
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: K-Dense-AI /scientific-agent-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: rohitg00 /agentmemory | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

item.title: tinyhumansai /openhuman | Rust | N/A
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
